archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with a Velvet-Rope Magic Show aesthetic

typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-orange-200 drop-shadow-sm
typography.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

surfaces_and_materials.gold_button: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-amber-500 text-black font-bold border border-yellow-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,165,0,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,165,0,0.6)] transition-all

hero_composition.description: A cohesive scene featuring the Genie emerging from the lamp with smoke, replacing the old disconnected sticker approach.
hero_composition.background: Dark radial gradient from top-center (#301010 to #0A0A0A) simulating stage lighting.

elements.name: Spotlight
elements.css: absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[800px] h-[600px] bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-orange-500/20 via-orange-500/5 to-transparent blur-3xl -z-10

elements.name: Lamp
elements.position: absolute bottom-10 right-10 md:right-32 w-32 md:w-48 z-20 drop-shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,215,0,0.6)]

elements.name: Genie
elements.position: absolute bottom-32 right-0 md:right-20 w-80 md:w-[28rem] z-10 [mask-image:linear-gradient(to_bottom,black_60%,transparent_100%)]

elements.name: Smoke
elements.css: absolute bottom-10 right-10 md:right-20 w-96 h-96 bg-orange-500/30 blur-[80px] mix-blend-screen rounded-full z-15

game_cards_system.layout: Grid of cards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4) with generous gap-6
game_cards_system.card_style: velvet_card from surfaces_and_materials, rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group relative transition-transform hover:-translate-y-2 hover:border-orange-500/50
game_cards_system.hover_effect: A dynamic radial spotlight following the mouse, or a static glowing blur at the bottom of the card that intensifies on hover.

games.name: Fire Kirin
games.icon_strategy: Combine Lucide 'Flame' and 'Waves' icons, or custom SVG of a fiery dragon/koi.

games.name: Juwa
games.icon_strategy: Combine Lucide 'Cherry' (if available, or 'Circle' grouped) and 'Dices' to represent slot/cherries.

games.name: Ultra Panda
games.icon_strategy: Combine Lucide 'Leaf' (bamboo) and 'Circle' shapes to form a panda face silhouette.

animations.buttons: Ripple effect on click, scale up 1.05 on hover
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-in up for text, cards, and sections using Framer Motion
animations.ambient: Slow floating animations for mascots, slow pulsing for background glows

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, links, game cards, login forms) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='game-card-juwa').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: Playfair Display and Outfit in index.html or global css.
Remove the old generic sticker images (gingerbread VR and square crop coins).
Build the hero section exactly as described in hero_composition to ensure the Genie looks like it's naturally emerging from the lamp.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the marketing/landing page for full creative control over the layouts, asymmetrical grid bento boxes for features.

Ensure all 7 game cards are built. For games without SVG assets, construct a visually distinct SVG directly in the React component using paths or grouped Lucide icons colored with their respective theme_color.
Apply the velvet_card and glass_panel utility classes/styles to give the app a luxury, magical Vegas atmosphere.
Check App.js to ensure no routing or functional state is broken while applying the visual overhaul.
